output.summary: Update GalleryCarousel to align paddings with other carousel blocks (CardsCarousel, TestimonialsCarousel, DynamicContentCarousel), lock button/progress bar colors to neon-green/blue gradient consistently, and add missing accessibility features per WAI-ARIA carousel pattern.

fileChanges.description: Refactor dark mode to use pseudo-element pattern (matching CardsCarousel/TestimonialsCarousel/DynamicContentCarousel), standardize paddings to py-18 md:py-23, add slide ARIA attributes (role=group, aria-roledescription=slide, aria-label=Slide X of Y)
fileChanges.details:
CURRENT: The GalleryCarousel uses an actual div with bg-charcoal rounded-3xl and inner padding (py-9 sm:py-24), wrapped by container py-18 md:py-23. This creates compound padding that differs from other carousels.

TARGET (matching other carousel blocks):
1. Section: theme_block_props('gallery-carousel dark bg-transparent!')
2. Container wrapper: class="container relative py-18 md:py-23 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:inset-y-0 md:before:-inset-x-8"
3. Remove the inner bg-charcoal div entirely - the pseudo-element provides the dark background
4. Keep the noise texture overlay inside the container (absolute positioned)
5. ThemeHeading gets className='mb-8 md:mb-16' to match other carousels
6. Add slide ARIA on each swiper-slide: role=group, aria-roledescription=slide, aria-label='Slide X of Y'
7. Since GalleryCarousel uses inner blocks (not a PHP loop), the slide ARIA must be added in GalleryCarouselItem.php (see separate file change below)

fileChanges.description: Cannot add positional slide ARIA here (no access to slide index/total in inner blocks). Leave slide ARIA to JavaScript initialization (already handled in GalleryCarousel.js updateSlideAriaAttributes). No changes needed.
fileChanges.details: Inner blocks do not have access to their position in the parent's child list via PHP. The existing JS-based approach in GalleryCarousel.js (updateSlideAriaAttributes function) correctly adds role=group, aria-roledescription=slide, and aria-label='Slide X of Y' after Swiper init. This is the correct pattern for inner-block-based carousels.

fileChanges.description: Refactor to use pseudo-element dark mode pattern matching other carousels, standardize paddings
fileChanges.details:
CHANGES:
1. Replace the inner bg-charcoal div with pseudo-element approach: container div gets className="container relative py-18 md:py-23 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:inset-y-0 md:before:-inset-x-8"
2. Move the noise texture overlay inside the new container structure (keep it absolute positioned)
3. ThemeHeading gets className='mb-8 md:mb-16'
4. Remove py-9 sm:py-24 and gap-8 sm:gap-16 from inner wrapper
5. Ensure the swiper-parent and controls structure stays the same
6. Section class stays as 'gallery-carousel dark bg-transparent!'

fileChanges.description: Verify gradient color lock is using CSS variables (not raw rgba values) - currently correct, no changes needed
fileChanges.details: CURRENT: .gallery-carousel { --gradient-left: var(--color-neon-green); --gradient-right: var(--color-blue); } -- This is correct and matches CardsCarousel and DynamicContentCarousel. No change needed. The gradient variables control both the progress bar fill AND the nav button hover gradient via the shared swiper.css rules (.carousel-nav-btn::before and .swiper-pagination-progressbar-fill).

fileChanges.description: Add inert management for inactive slides (matching TestimonialsCarousel pattern), ensure Play.svg from resources is used instead of inline SVG
fileChanges.details:
CHANGES:
1. Add inert attribute management for inactive slides when not in loop mode (copy pattern from TestimonialsCarousel.js lines 109-129): after Swiper init, set inert on non-visible slides, update on slideChange event. For GalleryCarousel (slidesPerView: 1), slides before/after activeIndex get inert.
2. The inline play SVG icon in the autoplay toggle handler should ideally use the Play.svg file, but since this is a frontend JS file (no bundler SVG imports for inline HTML), the inline approach is the standard pattern used across all carousel blocks. Keep consistent.

fileChanges.description: Change raw rgba values to CSS variable references for gradient color lock (consistency fix)

designDecisions.question: GalleryCarousel currently uses a different dark mode pattern (actual bg-charcoal div with inner padding) compared to the other carousels (pseudo-element background). Should we refactor to match the pseudo-element pattern?
designDecisions.recommendation: Yes - refactor to use the pseudo-element pattern (before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl) matching CardsCarousel, TestimonialsCarousel, and DynamicContentCarousel. This standardizes the padding to py-18 md:py-23 across all carousel blocks and eliminates the compound padding issue.

designDecisions.question: The noise texture overlay in GalleryCarousel is unique to this block. How should it be positioned in the refactored structure?
designDecisions.recommendation: Keep the noise texture overlay as an absolutely positioned element inside the container div, above the pseudo-element background. The overlay is purely decorative (aria-hidden=true) and won't affect layout. It should sit between the pseudo-element bg and the content.

designDecisions.question: Should the button and progress bar colors always use the neon-green/blue gradient regardless of page accent color?
designDecisions.recommendation: Yes - all carousel blocks already lock the gradient to neon-green/blue via CSS custom properties. GalleryCarousel.css already does this correctly. The shared swiper.css applies the gradient to both .carousel-nav-btn::before (hover state) and .swiper-pagination-progressbar-fill. No color changes needed for GalleryCarousel - the lock is already in place.

designDecisions.question: Should inactive/off-screen slides be marked with the inert attribute?
designDecisions.recommendation: Yes - add inert management matching TestimonialsCarousel.js. Since GalleryCarousel shows 1 slide at a time, all slides except the active one should get inert when not in loop mode. This prevents keyboard users from tabbing into invisible slides.

designDecisions.question: The GalleryCarousel inner dark card currently has rounded-3xl corners with overflow-hidden. With the pseudo-element pattern, the rounded corners come from the before pseudo-element. Does this affect the noise texture?
designDecisions.recommendation: The noise texture overlay needs to be clipped to the same rounded shape. With the pseudo-element approach, add a separate overflow-hidden rounded-3xl div to contain the noise texture, or apply the noise via CSS on the pseudo-element itself. The simplest approach: keep a minimal wrapper div inside the container for the noise texture only, with absolute positioning, rounded-3xl, overflow-hidden, and pointer-events-none.

currentState.carouselContainer: Has role=region and aria-roledescription=carousel in PHP - GOOD
currentState.labelledBy: Has aria-labelledby pointing to heading ID - GOOD
currentState.fallbackLabel: Has aria-label='Gallery Carousel' when no heading - GOOD
currentState.slideAriaViaJs: JS updateSlideAriaAttributes adds role=group, aria-roledescription=slide, aria-label='Slide X of Y' - GOOD
currentState.rotationControl: Has autoplay toggle button with dynamic aria-label (Stop/Start slide rotation) - GOOD
currentState.ariaLive: Has aria-live=off when autoplay running, aria-live=polite when paused - GOOD
currentState.focusPauseResume: Has focusin/focusout handlers to pause/resume autoplay - GOOD
currentState.prefersReducedMotion: Checks prefers-reduced-motion and disables autoplay - GOOD
currentState.focusVisible: carousel-nav-btn has :focus-visible styles in swiper.css - GOOD
currentState.navButtons: Have aria-label and title attributes - GOOD

gaps.issue: Missing inert attribute on inactive slides
gaps.description: Off-screen slides are still interactive and focusable. Keyboard users can tab into invisible slide content. TestimonialsCarousel already implements this pattern.
gaps.fix: Add inert management in GalleryCarousel.js (set inert on non-active slides, update on slideChange)

gaps.issue: Rotation control placement should be first tab-stop in carousel
gaps.description: Per WAI-ARIA carousel pattern: 'Rotation control placement: Must be the first tab-stop inside the carousel for easy location by keyboard users'. Currently the autoplay toggle IS the first element in the controls row (before pagination and nav buttons), which is correct. No change needed.
gaps.fix: No action needed - already correctly positioned

compliantItems: Carousel container has role=region with aria-roledescription=carousel
Slides get role=group with aria-roledescription=slide via JS
Rotation control uses dynamic accessible name (not aria-pressed)
aria-live toggles between off (rotating) and polite (paused)
Autoplay stops on keyboard focus and resumes on blur
Navigation buttons have aria-label and title
Focus-visible styles applied to nav buttons

currentGalleryCarousel.inner: bg-charcoal rounded-3xl px-[18px] py-9 sm:px-8 sm:py-24
currentGalleryCarousel.effectiveVertical: py-18 + py-9 = py-27 (mobile), md:py-23 + sm:py-24 = md:py-47 (desktop) -- COMPOUND PADDING

testimonialsCarousel.outer: container relative py-18 md:py-23 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal...

dynamicContentCarousel.outer: container relative py-18 md:py-23 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal...

paddingComparison.conclusion: GalleryCarousel has significantly more vertical padding due to compound inner+outer padding. Must refactor to match py-18 md:py-23 pattern.

colorComparison.testimonialsCarousel: .testimonials-carousel { --gradient-left: rgba(212, 255, 69, 1); --gradient-right: rgba(71, 203, 242, 1); } -- USES RAW VALUES instead of var()
colorComparison.progressBarGradient: Shared in swiper.css: .swiper-pagination-progressbar-fill uses linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gradient-left), var(--gradient-right))
colorComparison.navButtonGradient: Shared in swiper.css: .carousel-nav-btn::before uses same gradient variables
colorComparison.conclusion: All carousel blocks correctly lock colors to neon-green/blue. GalleryCarousel is already correct. TestimonialsCarousel should use var() for consistency but values are identical.
